data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: RED tolerance verified ✓ — 7 PASSED, 4 FAILED (expected RED failures): (1) enrich dry-run output missing sentinel model ID, (2) semantic-conflict exits 0 instead of 1 when haiku absent from config, (3) generate-eval YAML missing sentinel model ID, (4) generate-eval YAML still has hardcoded claude-haiku-4-5-20251001. Full run-all timed out (exit 144 per known ceiling), targeted test confirms RED state.
